Hoang Sa Lo 41, Da Nang, Vietnam
Sontra Sea Hotel Da Nang
Superb

09 Jun 2026
10 Jun 2026

## Sontra Sea Hotel 
Located in the Son Tra Penisula district, the 2-star Sontra Sea Hotel Da Nang is within a 6-km distance of such culture-oriented attractions as the compact Da Nang Museum of Cham Sculpture. Featuring 17 rooms with views of the sea, this Da Nang hotel is approximately a 10-minute drive from the Gothic-style pink church "Danang Cathedral".
You'll be 2.6 km from the Linh Ung Pagoda and within 3 km of Thuan Phuoc Field. The Sontra Sea Da Nang is also around a 15-minute ride from such natural sights as the shorefront East Sea Park. The area offers shopping experiences such as the Han Market, which is 4.6 km from the hotel. The accommodation is within easy reach of 4 Nguyen Phan Vinh bus stop.
The rooms comprise a sitting area complete with ironing equipment and air conditioning, as well as a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and pay-per-view channels. They are appointed with carpet flooring, soundproof windows. Bathrooms come with a bidet, a separate toilet, and a shower, along with hair dryers and towels.
The Sontra Sea is about 600 metres from Nam Danh Seafood.

## EXPERIENCING THE PERFECT LIFE AT THE PENINSULA HOTEL DA NANG
Peninsula Hotel Danang located at 84 Vo Nguyen Giap Street, Son Tra District, Danang City. The Peninsula Hotel Danang has 259 rooms which have a view of the sea, city, and Son Tra Peninsula. The hotel has a restaurant, a lounge, an infinity pool, a gym, a bar, and a ballroom to make your holiday complete.The Peninsula Hotel Danang offers a blend of the best Eastern and Western hospitality in an atmosphere of unmatched classical grandeur and timeless elegance.
[More info](https://peninsulahotel.vn/experiences "EXPERIENCING THE PERFECT LIFE AT THE PENINSULA HOTEL DA NANG")
## Type Room
[View All](https://peninsulahotel.vn/accommodation "View All")
### [Grand Executive Ocean Queen](https://peninsulahotel.vn/grand-executive-ocean-queen "Grand Executive Ocean Queen")
Relax and listen to the waves whisper in your ears, experience the infinity pool, and enjoy a romantic dinner under the starry sky. If you are looking for a private retreat, leaving behind the hustle and bustle of the city, Grand Executive Ocean Queen is the best choice for you.The room rate is inclusive of afternoon tea. 
### [Elizabeth Suite](https://peninsulahotel.vn/elizabeth-suite "Elizabeth Suite")
Immerse yourself in the vast expanse of Son Tra peninsula and marvel at the immense beauty of the sea and distant woodland peaks. Elizabeth Suite, with its 85 square meters, balcony, and classic European-style bathroom, is a great choice for a relaxing stay with family and friends.The room rate is inclusive of afternoon tea. 
### [Peninsula Suite](https://peninsulahotel.vn/peninsula-suite "Peninsula Suite")
Located on the 23rd floor of the hotel with a direct view of the sea, an area of 130 square meters, including 1 queen bed & 2 twin beds. Peninsula Suite is the perfect choice for a relaxing stay with family and friends. The room rate is inclusive of afternoon tea. 
### [Deluxe City View Queen](https://peninsulahotel.vn/deluxe-city-queen "Deluxe City View Queen")
From the 5th to the 26th floor, a vibrant and bustling city scene of Da Nang can be seen. Deluxe City Queen has a highly classic yet modern style, making it ideal for business trips or travel. A desk, free internet access, and many other ameniti

##  Palmier Hotel - Art House Da Nang | Vietnam - Da Nang 
305 Tran Hung Dao, An Hai Bac, Son Tra, Da Nang, Vietnam [ (Show map) ](javascript:)
###  Palmier Hotel - Art House Da Nang description 
Situated in Da Nang, 1.9 km from My Khe Beach, Palmier Hotel Da Nang features accommodation with a restaurant, free private parking, a bar and a garden. Boasting family rooms, this property also provides guests with a terrace. The accommodation offers a 24-hour front desk, airport transfers, room service and free WiFi throughout the property.
At the hotel, rooms are equipped with a wardrobe. All rooms at Palmier Hotel Da Nang have air conditioning and a desk.
The accommodation offers a buffet or à la carte breakfast.
Popular points of interest near Palmier Hotel Da Nang include Song Han Bridge, Love Lock Bridge Da Nang and Indochina Riverside Mall. The nearest airport is Da Nang International Airport, 6 km from the hotel.

name: Son Tra Resort & Spa
content:
# Experience Tranquility at Son Tra Resort & Spa
Experience luxury on the beautiful beachfront.
### About Son Tra Resort
**Experience luxury and tranquility at our beachfront paradise.**
Nestled in a private bay on the stunning **Son Tra Peninsula** , **Son Tra Resort & Spa** is an exclusive beachfront retreat just 15 minutes from **Da Nang city center** and 20 minutes from **Da Nang International Airport**.Embraced by lush mountains and overlooking the crystal-clear sea, the resort offers a perfect harmony of nature and elegance — a peaceful escape from the noise and bustle of everyday life.
Located beside beaches once voted by **Forbes** as among the **six most beautiful in the world** , Son Tra Resort is surrounded by the untouched forest known as the **“green lung” of Vietnam** , home to rare flora and fauna species.Each private villa features a spacious design, an outdoor swimming pool, and breathtaking ocean views — creating the ultimate sanctuary for relaxation and privacy.
Whether you seek a romantic getaway, a family retreat, or a serene escape into nature, **Son Tra Resort & Spa** invites you to indulge in refined comfort and unforgettable memories.Once you visit, you’ll surely want to return.
**Recreation & Facilities**• Restaurant & Bar• Swimming Pool• Spa & Massage• Beach Volleyball• Water Sports Activities• SUP & Kayaking

Golden Sea Hotel
## Golden Sea Hotel information
Golden Sea Hotel is conveniently located in the popular Phuoc My area. The property features a wide range of facilities to make your stay a pleasant experience. All the necessary facilities, including free Wi-Fi in all rooms, 24-hour front desk, 24-hour room service, Wi-Fi in public areas, car park, are at hand. All rooms are designed and decorated to make guests feel right at home, and some rooms come with television LCD/plasma screen, internet access – wireless, internet access – wireless (complimentary), non smoking rooms, air conditioning. The hotel offers various recreational opportunities. Friendly staff, great facilities and close proximity to all that Da Nang has to offer are three great reasons you should stay at Golden Sea Hotel.

### Location
With a stay at Golden Sea Hotel in Da Nang (Son Tra), you'll be within a 5-minute drive of My Khe Beach and Han River. This beach hotel is 1.5 mi (2.3 km) from Han Market and 1.6 mi (2.6 km) from Dragon Bridge.

####  THE CODE HOTEL & SPA 
**The Code Hotel & Spa Da Nang – Your Seaside Escape at Son Tra**
Nestled on the tranquil shores of Man Thai Beach, The Code Hotel & Spa offers the perfect seaside retreat with sweeping views of the endless ocean. Guests can immerse themselves in the infinity pool, unwind in the sauna, or sip handcrafted cocktails at the rooftop bar while admiring the sparkling cityscape of Da Nang
[More Details](https://thecodehotel.com.vn/about.html)
### room
#### YOUR COMFORT ZONE
Previous
### Superior Family Room
Phòng Connecting Room rộng rãi, lý tưởng cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn, mang đến sự thoải mái và tiện nghi trong không gian hiện đại. Phòng được trang bị máy điều hòa, minibar và phòng tắm riêng với vòi sen đi bộ cùng chậu rửa vệ sinh. Ngoài ra, phòng còn có ban công, TV màn hình phẳng với các kênh truyền hình vệ tinh, két an toàn và ấm đun nước điện. Với hai phòng ngủ thông nhau và tổng cộng 3 giường, đây là lựa chọn hoàn hảo, vừa đảm bảo sự riêng tư vừa mang lại cảm giác gần gũi, thuận tiện cho cả gia đình
### Family Room with Sea View
Phòng Family Room with Sea View mang đến không gian tiện nghi và thoải mái, lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ của gia đình. Phòng rộng rãi, được trang bị máy điều hòa và phòng tắm riêng với vòi sen đi bộ, chậu rửa vệ sinh, máy sấy tóc cùng đồ dùng vệ sinh cá nhân và áo choàng tắm miễn phí. Từ phòng, khách có thể chiêm ngưỡng tầm nhìn hướng biển tuyệt đẹp, đồng thời tận hưởng các tiện nghi hiện đại như TV màn hình phẳng với các kênh truyền hình vệ tinh, minibar, két an toàn và ấm đun nước điện. Phòng có 4 giường, phù hợp cho gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn muốn tìm kiếm sự thư giãn và thuận tiện trong cùng một không gian
### Superior Room 
Tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trong Phòng Superior với giường đôi/ đơn êm ái, phòng tắm hiện đại và ban công. Phòng được trang bị máy điều hòa, minibar và TV màn hình phẳng, mang đến cho bạn không gian nghỉ ngơi trọn vẹn
### Deluxe City View 
Trải nghiệm vẻ đẹp sôi động của thành phố Đà Nẵng ngay từ căn phòng của bạn. Phòng Deluxe City View được trang bị giường đôi/giường đơn, phòng tắm riêng hiện đại và ban công riêng với tầm nhìn toàn cảnh thành phố. Tận hưởng những tiện nghi cao cấp như điều hòa không khí, minibar và TV màn hình phẳng — mang đến cho bạn một kỳ nghỉ vừa phong cách vừa thư giãn.
### Deluxe Ocean View
Thức dậy cùng khung cảnh tuyệt đẹp của biển Đà Nẵng lấp lánh ngay từ ban công riêng của bạn. Phòng Deluxe Ocean View được trang bị giường đôi/giường đơn, phòng tắm riêng hiện đại và nội thất tinh tế mang đến sự thoải mái tối đa. Tận hưởng các tiện nghi cao cấp như điều hòa không khí, minibar và TV màn hình phẳng — lựa chọn lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ thư giãn bên bờ biển.
### Premier Deluxe Ocean View
Enjoy heavenly the beauty of romantic and rustic fishing village nestled under the Monkey Mo

## About
🏝️🌴 Discover Your Dream Beach Getaway at The Backpacker Hostel and Spa! 🌴🏝️Attention all beach lovers and traveler! Are you ready for an unforgettable adventure in the beautiful Da Nang City? Look no further! The Backpacker Hostel and Spa is your perfect Coastal getaway, just a short 10-minute walk from the stunning sandy shores of Da Nang City.🚲 Explore Da Nang's Gems with Free Bicycles! 🚲We know you love exploring, so we provide FREE BICYCLES to make sure you can explore as much as you want. Escape the chaos and immerse yourself in the local culture – our location strikes the perfect balance! 🍹 Experience Our Very own Chillhub Beach Bar! 🍹Thirsty for adventure? Our Chillhub Beach Bar is just a 10-minute bicycle ride from the hostel. Enjoy comfy chairs, delicious food, beach parties, and more. Free bicycles available for exploring the beach area!🏊‍♂️ Relax, Recharge, and Refresh! 🏊‍♂️Your comfort is our priority at The Backpacker Hostel and Spa. Enjoy our refreshing pool, laid-back lounge, and fully equipped spa. Stay connected with free WiFi and a convenient working space.💥 Fun Activities and Exclusive Discounts 💥We love to make your stay even more exciting with our fantastic offers:-Free Bicycles (Limited Stock)-FREE WELCOME DRINKS at The Backpacker Rooftop from 4 pm until 5 pm (every day)-Free Shuttle to the famous hidden Bar called Arcade social The Backpacker Restaurant and Bar (Fusion Menu+Vietnamese Cuisine)BREAKFAST+LUNCH+DINNER AVAILABLE- Motorbike Rental directly from our Hostel.- Board Games, Drinking Games, Card Games.- Daily Events at our rooftop bar- All TV channels available at our BAR for worldwide sports, and movie coverage.- Tours starting from just 200k ($8.40)- Discount at our in-house SPA and complimentary gift! :)15% Discount at Chillhub Beach Bar and Restaurant15% Discount at Ans Vegetarian (City Side)5% Discount at our very own Jewelry store (City Side)-Daily food specials-Daily drink specials-Sunset view-Sunrise view🛏️ Home Away from Home 🏡Feel right at home with our cozy atmosphere and super comfy beds. Choose from a variety of dorm rooms or private rooms to suit your needs.🌟 Let Our Friendly Team Be Your Guides! 🌟Our team is here to make your journey unforgettable. We'll show you the best tours, street food spots, and attractions in Da Nang, Hoi An, and Hue.⛔ ATTENTION PLEASE READ BEFORE BOOKING ⛔We want to be completely transparent about our location: The Backpacker Hostel and Spa is situated jus

name: Nguyen Gia Hotel
content:
## WELCOME TO NGUYEN GIA HOTEL
Lắng nghe "**Lời thì thầm của biển!** "
Khách sạn Nguyên Gia - Một không gian mộc mạc và độc đáo, tọa lạc ngay trung tâm quận Sơn Trà nổi tiếng với những bãi biển thơ mộng trải dài như vô tận chắc chắn sẽ là sựa lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn. Chúng tôi hiểu rằng, bạn đã dành khá nhiều thời gian cho cuộc sống cũng như bộn bề công việc. Chính vì thế những phút giây thư giãn, nghỉ ngơi riêng tư hay tận hưởng cùng người thân, bạn bè là vô cùng đáng quý. Ở Nguyên Gia, chúng tôi luôn nâng niu, trân trọng những phút giây quý giá đó của bạn và mong muốn đem đến cho bạn những trải nghiệm trọn vẹn nhất cho kỳ nghỉ của mình. Hơn cả “một chốn nghỉ chân”, điều chúng tôi muốn dành tặng bạn là "**một nơi để trở về"**
## [Phòng nghỉ](https://nguyengiahotel.com/chuyen-muc-phong-nghi/phong-nghi/ "Phòng nghỉ")
Khách sạn Nguyên Gia cung cấp 55 phòng nghỉ được thiết kế theo phong cách thô mộc, tối giản nhưng tinh tế và đầy đủ tiện nghi hiện đại mang đến cho Quý khách một không gian nghỉ ngơi thực thụ
### [Nguyên Gia Suite](https://nguyengiahotel.com/phong-nghi/grand-suite-ocean-panorama/ "Nguyên Gia Suite")
48m²
### [Premier King Ocean Balcony](https://nguyengiahotel.com/phong-nghi/deluxe-ocean/ "Premier King Ocean Balcony")
24m²
### [Deluxe Double With Ocean Balcony](https://nguyengiahotel.com/phong-nghi/deluxe-king/ "Deluxe Double With Ocean Balcony")
18m²
### [Family Sea View](https://nguyengiahotel.com/phong-nghi/phong-connecting-room/ "Family Sea View")
36m²
### [Deluxe Double/Twin Sea View](https://nguyengiahotel.com/phong-nghi/superior-ocean/ "Deluxe Double/Twin Sea View")
20m²
Toạ lạc tại tầng 2 của khách sạn, nhà hàng “Nguyên Gia buffet” là nơi bạn được thoả sức nạp đầy năng lượng bởi những món ăn vừa tươi ngon lại hết sức đẹp mắt.
### [Bể bơi, Pool Bar](https://nguyengiahotel.com/be-boi/)
Bể bơi, Pool bar luôn là địa điểm lý tưởng để bạn cùng nhóm của mình thoả sức tận hưởng, du dương trong điệu nhạc với những ly đồ uống yêu thích. Hãy cùng tụ tập bạn bè khám phá những bữa tiệc cocktail bên cạnh hồ bơi xanh mát nhé.
Ở Nguyên Gia, chúng tôi luôn quan tâm và chu đáo nhằm mang đến cho Quý khách kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn nhất
## Đánh giá của khách hàng
###  Dịch vụ cực kỳ tốt 
Ks sạch sẽ 
####  Lê Vinh 
Hà Nội 
###  This is a brand new hotel right on the beach with a spectacular view! 
Nguyen Gia Hotel is such a great place to stay that I returned one week after my first visit and stayed for three more nights. It is a brand new hotel right on the beach in Da Nang. Everything is spotlessly clean and the rooms are extremely comfortable with top-quality beds and linens, smart TVs and excellent wifi. The roof-top pool is great, too! However, what I love most about this hotel is the million-dollar view. Highly recommended! 
####  David 
Australia

# A high-style seaside retreat wrapped in pristine rainforest
##  A high-style seaside retreat wrapped in pristine rainforest
## Recharge your imagination in our private, perfect world
Celebrate sunshine and seclusion at one of Vietnam’s most spectacular beach resorts. Retreat into a world of unspoiled nature, set on our private bay, where you’ll be enlivened by bold, creative architecture that marries local heritage with world-class design. From top-tier destination dining to barefoot days of beachside bliss, savour every moment as our team crafts the perfect experience, grounded in Vietnamese hospitality.

Property Description
Located in Da Nang, 200 metres from My Khe Beach, Hà Nội Hotel Đà Nẵng provides accommodation with a shared lounge, free private parking, a terrace and a private beach area. With free WiFi, this 3-star hotel offers a shared kitchen and room service. The accommodation offers a 24-hour front desk, a concierge service and currency exchange for guests. Guest rooms are equipped with air conditioning, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a fridge, a kettle, a bidet, a hairdryer and a desk. Each room is equipped with a private bathroom with a shower, while some rooms are equipped with a balcony and others also offer sea views. At the hotel each room comes with bed linen and towels. Song Han Bridge is 3.2 km from Hà Nội Hotel Đà Nẵng, while Indochina Riverside Mall is 4 km away. The nearest airport is Da Nang International Airport, 8 km from the accommodation.

name: Dolphin Hotel and Apartment
content:
# Dolphin Hotel And Apartment Da Nang 
09 Tan Thuan, Da Nang, Vietnam
Dolphin Hotel And Apartment Da Nang
Superb
957 reviews
See all photos
09 Jun 2026
10 Jun 2026
  * General
  * Map
  * Room overview
  * Features
  * Photo gallery
  * Reviews
  * Frequently asked questions


## Dolphin Hotel And Apartment 
Offering a rooftop pool, Dolphin Hotel And Apartment Da Nang is situated in the My Khe Beach district, 2.6 km from the Da Nang Museum. Featuring 18 rooms with views of the city, the hotel is about a 25-minute walk from the cable-stayed Han River Bridge.
You'll need 15-minute drive to Da Nang International airport. The love East Sea Park is not far from the Dolphin Hotel And Apartment Da Nang, while 16 Hoang Sa bus stop is a mere 650 metres away. Nature lovers will appreciate the proximity to My Khe Beach, which is around 5 minutes' walk away. Cultural experiences in the area feature the four-lane Thuan Phuoc Three-Span Bridge, situated 3.1 km from this 4-star aparthotel.
The Dolphin Hotel And Apartment offers rooms with a dressing area and a mini-kitchen featuring ironing equipment and air conditioning, along with an iPod dock and a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. Furnished with a writing table, they also have sound-proof windows. Bathroom essentials include a bidet and a separate toilet as well as a hairdryer and a shower cap for guests' extra comfort.
A delightful kid-friendly buffet breakfast is served at the Asian restaurant. The onsite restaurant specialises in Vietnamese cuisine. Located in the immediate vicinity of Dolphin Hotel And Apartment, the restaurant Zen Rooftop Lounge offers an Asian menu.

ngày 4 tháng 6 năm 2026
Nhìn chung giá cả phù hợp với nhu cầu thực tế, đối với cá nhân chỉ cần một chỗ ngủ như mình thì không có gì phải phàn nàn, có thang máy tiện lợi cho các bạn có hành lý quá khổ còn về giường thì mỏng và có phần khôn

## About
Discover a vibrant escape at Snite Hotel & Dorm, your home away from home nestled in the heart of Da Nang at 215 Trần Phú. Experience a unique blend of hotel comforts and dorm affordability, perfect for travelers seeking a stylish and social atmosphere.Imagine unwinding after a day exploring Da Nang's stunning beaches and cultural gems in our cozy accommodations. Whether you choose a private hotel room or a modern dorm bed, you'll find a relaxing haven designed for comfort and convenience. Snite Hotel & Dorm offers a fantastic location, putting you within easy reach of Da Nang's bustling city center and its many attractions. Step outside and immerse yourself in the local culture, indulge in delicious Vietnamese cuisine, and create unforgettable memories. We can't wait to welcome you to our little piece of paradise!

Stayed in Jan 2026
Axel
Male, 18-24, Sweden
DONT GO! We went to this hostel to stay 2 nights in Da Nang, after 1 night we cancelled the booking. There was NO RUNNING WATER, the toilets didn’t work and the showers didn’t work either. Our room also smelled off sewage. After trying to claim refund because the hostel didn’t live up to what had been promised during booking we got a response from the manager that he REFUSES to do any sort of refunds despite the terrible conditions of the hostel. Absolutely horrendous. Worst experience i’ve had.

name: ALYSSA Da Nang Hotel
content:
## Welcome to Alyssa Hotel Da Nang
Experience the perfect blend of coastal relaxation and urban convenience at Alyssa Hotel Da Nang. Situated just minutes from the pristine sands of My Khe Beach, this contemporary property offers a sophisticated retreat for travelers seeking comfort in the heart of Vietnam’s most vibrant seaside city.
The accommodation features thoughtfully designed rooms equipped with premium amenities to ensure a restful stay. Whether visiting for business or leisure, guests benefit from seamless connectivity and professional service in a prime coastal location.
  * Walking distance to the world-renowned My Khe Beach
  * Complimentary high-speed WiFi throughout the property
  * Safe and secure free private parking for all guests
  * Modern guest rooms with elegant interior design
  * Proximity to local seaside dining and Da Nang attractions


Discover the beauty of Central Vietnam from a refined base designed for ultimate relaxation. Book a stay at Alyssa Hotel Da Nang today to secure the best rates for a seaside escape.
## How to Find Alyssa Hotel Da Nang
**ALYSSA Da Nang Hotel, Da Nang**
## Frequently Asked Questions About Alyssa Hotel Da Nang
### What amenities does Alyssa Hotel Da Nang offer?
+
Alyssa Hotel Da Nang offers modern rooms with air conditioning, free WiFi, and comfortable furnishings for an enjoyable stay.
### How do I get to Alyssa Hotel Da Nang?
+
Alyssa Hotel Da Nang is located at ALYSSA Da Nang Hotel, Da Nang. Please check the map above for directions.
### What are the check-in and check-out times at Alyssa Hotel Da Nang?
+
Standard check-in at Alyssa Hotel Da Nang is at 2:00 PM and check-out is at 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out may be available upon request.
### Can I cancel or modify my Alyssa Hotel Da Nang booking?
+
Cancellation policies vary by booking type. Please refer to your confirmation email or contact Alyssa Hotel Da Nang directly for details.
## Start the Ultimate Da Nang Shoreline Escape
Secure a room at Alyssa Hotel Da Nang and enjoy effortless access to the sun-drenched shores of My Khe Beach.
[Reserve Your Room Now](https://booking.stay22.com/ferrandoseo/NX0g17J1aJ)
